125],[267,577,1776530356158],[267,578,1776530356183],[266,578,1776530356203],[265,579,1776530356232],[264,579,1776530356272],[264,580,1776530356290],[263,580,1776530356320],[262,581,1776530356348],[261,581,1776530356369],[261,582,1776530356384],[260,582,1776530356388],[259,582,1776530356425],[259,583,1776530356437],[259,583,1776530356440],[262,581,1776530356453],[267,579,1776530356467],[274,574,1776530356479],[281,569,1776530356490],[287,564,1776530356504],[292,560,1776530356515],[294,558,1776530356530],[294,558,1776530356547],[295,558,1776530356553],[296,558,1776530356562],[297,558,1776530356592],[298,559,1776530356617],[299,559,1776530356626],[300,559,1776530356651],[299,559,1776530356679],[298,559,1776530356698],[297,559,1776530356718],[297,558,1776530356730],[296,558,1776530356745],[295,558,1776530356771],[294,558,1776530356798]],"mm-mp":19.0,"md":[[300,559,1776530356664]],"md-mp":4208.0,"mu":[[300,559,1776530356805]],"mu-mp":4226.75},"v":1,"tc":{}}
